# authorization()

**Instance Method**

Returns the authorization object associated with this view.

## Declaration

```swift
func authorization() -> SFAuthorization!
```

## Discussion

The authorization object is defined in [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/SecurityFoundation].

## Getting information about the authorization view

- **authorizationRights()**: Returns the authorization rights for this view.
- **authorizationState()**: Returns the current state of the authorization view.
- **isEnabled()**: Indicates whether the authorization view is enabled ([doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true]) or disabled ([doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false]).
